affiliations.name: Columbia Business School
affiliations.role_hu: Carson Family egyetemi tanár, üzleti tudományok

bio_en: Miklós Sárváry is the Carson Family Professor of Business at Columbia Business School. His research is in marketing science, media economics, digital markets, network effects, technology diffusion, and the economics of digital currencies and AI. His work has appeared in Management Science, the Journal of Marketing Research, Marketing Science, the Journal of Marketing, and Quantitative Marketing and Economics. He has been cited over 10,000 times.
bio_hu: Sárváry Miklós a Columbia Business School Carson Family egyetemi tanára. Kutatási területei a marketingtudomány, médiagazdaságtan, digitális piacok, hálózati hatások, technológia-elterjedés, valamint a digitális pénzek és a mesterséges intelligencia gazdaságtana. Munkái megjelentek a Management Science, Journal of Marketing Research, Marketing Science, Journal of Marketing és Quantitative Marketing and Economics folyóiratokban. Több mint 10 000 hivatkozással rendelkezik.
